imageHints.suggestedSubject: warm lifestyle photo — nature, hands, soft interior, person in context
imageHints.treatment: photo at 50% opacity to allow italic quote text to read clearly on any background

useCases: Motivational quote posts attributed to a named person
Lifestyle vlog or journal posts with a personal quote
Partner or client quote posts in a warm editorial context
avoidCases: When the quote is more than 2 sentences (italic text at 88px overflows)
When no atmospheric lifestyle photo is available (use affirmation-note)
When the attribution needs to be anonymous
